excerpt: the 'Hindu' religion was born among the Arabs of Mecca and they made countless...idols...so he made 365 idols in the Kaaba according to 365 days of the year

When Jesus came up with the concept of monotheism, he presented the concept of monotheism to his Ummah in three ways, but his disciples went astray and returned to their origin and accepted God in three parts
After Jesus, there was a time when the idea of the three gods was wrong because there were only two kinds of things in this world: good or bad...the concept of two gods was born
by looking at the smoke, we know that there must be a fire somewhere
Whatever comes into the illusion is against it. There is no equivalent to this. Tongues are dumb to His attributes, and intellects are unable to comprehend Him
Monotheism is not for Allah, but for His limits

We are in our snare and in the straits of lust...when we seek to receive Your remembrance without that of which You are capable, we point to You out of compulsion, which is a sin, but this sin of ours is connected with forgiveness
Everything in this world is encompassed in the house, which is characteristic of the physical world. And Allah is the Creator of time and space
Imam Jafar al-Sadiq said: The meaning of Allah Akbar is 'Allah is greater than to be confined to a limit or a limit'
source_work: Muharram Majalis Hazrat Abdullah bin Hibatullah

excerpt: There was no nothingness. Time was created by Him, so it is not possible for Him to exist under time
He created all the beings out of nothingness, and without any matter. If he were created from something, he would be flawed in his action
Allah is not a form, because every form is dependent on its Creator, and everything that is dependent on others for its existence is a creature, not a Creator

Letters are mute in themselves, and we are their creators, because letters cannot be spoken unless their speaker is present. That is, we try to interpret our Creator with our creation (letters), which is impossible
Allah is not a name, but a name...the First Intellect has 99 attributes which are described by names. These 99 attributes and a caste together make a total of 100

It is impossible for a noun to exist when an adjective does not...He is neither object nor creature, but the creator of everything, so it is inevitable that the attribute that comes to a thing cannot be attached to its Creator
Satan believed in Allah. He denies Adam and swears by Allah...There is no compulsion in religion...both paths are open to us

The believers said, 'Surely, Allah can do all things, but He cannot do wrong'...Allah has all the power, but He does not do wrong. He does not oppress despite having power, not because he cannot do wrong, but only because it is against His glory and greatness

Sincerity is that which is freed. And sincerity is the fruit of faith, and sincerity is the fruit of worship...and sincerity is the best deed! And no action can be the best without knowledge, and the highest knowledge is the knowledge of monotheism
He is the All-Knowing, one whose knowledge admits no doubt. He is the Ruler who commits no oppression. He is the Forbearing One who does not rush in His judgments. He neither dozes nor sleeps

there is no faith without honesty, and there is no honesty without knowledge, and there is no knowledge without confirmation, and there is no confirmation without monotheism, and there is no monotheism without sincerity, and not with sincerity anthropomorphism, because anthropomorphism has attributes

He is the Agent of every action, and His action is without direct contact. His guidance is without indication. His speech is without utterance. His face is wherever you direct your gaze. His path is the uprightness of the faith. He explains us to ourselves and teaches us through ourselves
source_work: Nahj al-Balagha or related Imam Ali sources

excerpt: I have been sent with comprehensive words (al-jāwamiʿ al-kalām)
He who knows his own soul has known his Lord; The deeper your self-knowledge, the deeper your knowledge of your Lord
